result.stdout:
Description:
  Generate Python projection for Windows Runtime types

Usage:
  PyWinRT [options]

Options:
  --input <spec>             Windows metadata to include in projection
  --reference <spec>         Windows metadata to reference from projection
  --output <path>            Location of generated projection [default: /tmp/inspectra-static-pywinr-6294b25f-55329edd]
  --include <prefix>         One or more prefixes to include in projection
  --exclude <prefix>         One or more prefixes to exclude from projection
  --header-path <path>       Install headers in custom path
  --nullability-json <path>  Nullability information JSON file
  --component-dlls           Set this flag when generating projection for user components that will ship with the required .dlls in the Python package
  --verbose                  Show detailed progress information
  --version                  Show version information
  -?, -h, --help             Show help and usage information

Where <spec> is one or more of:

  <package>:<path>    Python package name and path to winmd file or recursively scanned folder
  local               Local %WinDir%\System32\WinMetadata folder
  sdk[+]              Current version of Windows SDK [with extensions]
  10.0.12345.0[+]     Specific version of Windows SDK [with extensions]
